title: Whole Cake Island Comes Into View
description: On pages 15–16, this part focuses on Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14 as The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
scene: The Sanji retrieval team enters Big Mom’s sphere of influence, where every friendly face may be connected to the wedding trap.

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: He's done it! Mama's tantrum is over!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Well... that's all we could hope for!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You're a Life saver, boss jinbe!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whew... oh? If it isn't my loyal warrior of the sea! jinbe!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank you for your wonderful poneGlyph gift earlier.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Although I can't read it for the life of me! HaaAahaha! Mamamamama!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What's with the atmosphere here today?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The air in the capital seems overly sweet... are you responsible for this?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No... I only just arrived. I haven't a clue as to what happened.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The company has been designed to provide the following

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You wouldn't... by chance... be quitting my crew now ...would you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Jinbe's resolve! What is his intention?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 18 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
